mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS monitor_id, m.user_id, m.stock_code, COALESCE(s.stock_name, '') AS stock_name FROM user_stock_monitor m LEFT JOIN stock_basic s ON m.stock_code = s.stock_code WHERE m.is_active = 1

SELECT rq.current_price, sd.cash_per_share FROM ( SELECT r1.current_price FROM stock_realtime_quote r1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT stock_code, MAX(trade_date) AS max_date FROM stock_realtime_quote WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} GROUP BY stock_code ) r2 ON r1.stock_code = r2.stock_code AND r1.trade_date = r2.max_date ) rq CROSS JOIN ( SELECT d1.cash_per_share FROM stock_dividend d1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT stock_code, MAX(year) AS max_year FROM stock_dividend WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} GROUP BY stock_code ) d2 ON d1.stock_code = d2.stock_code AND d1.year = d2.max_year ) sd
